channel.title: informative on Hugo O Rivera
channel.description: Recent content in informative on Hugo O Rivera

item.title: Security News
item.description: Two of my cybersecurity courses at NMT asked students to write reports on recent security news. This continues to be a hobby of mine. When Trump Phones Friends, the Chinese and the Russians Listen and Learn - A solar observatory in New Mexico is evacuated for a week and the FBI is in Inside the NSA's War on Internet Security - SPIEGEL ONLINE How I Socially Engineer Myself Into High Security Facilities - Motherboard The Worst Cybersecurity Breaches of 2018 So Far | WIRED https://krebsonsecurity.

item.title: Contact Information
item.description: preferred email hugo аt roguh.com email rivera.hugo2319 аt gmail.com text or call +1 (774) 354-9367 use Keybase Chat if you want encrypted communications keybase.io/roguh, I also use Signal I check my LinkedIn inbox. linkedin.com/in/hugoorivera

item.title: Best Websites
item.description: In order, as determined by the knowledge graph and me: https://github.com/resir014/thebestmotherfuckingwebsite.co https://motherfuckingwebsite.com/ https://thebestmotherfucking.website/ http://bettermotherfuckingwebsite.com/ https://evenbettermotherfucking.website/ https://perfectmotherfuckingwebsite.com/ https://thebestmotherfuckingwebsite.co/

item.title: POC||GTFO mirrors
item.description: https://defuse.ca/pocorgtfo.htm https://www.alchemistowl.org/pocorgtfo/ https://greatscottgadgets.com/pocorgtfo/ https://www.geoffchappell.com/pocorgtfo/index.htm https://www.sultanik.com/pocorgtfo/ https://www.rahielkasim.com/pocorgtfo/ https://dustri.org/pocorgtfo/ http://www.the-collective.net/pocorgtfo/ http://openwall.info/wiki/people/solar/pocorgtfo http://ai4qr.com/pocorgtfo/ Github https://github.com/filcab/pocorgtfo https://github.com/tylert/pocorgtfo https://tylert.github.io/pocorgtfo https://github.com/fdiskyou/Zines/tree/master/pocorgtfo IPFS https://ipfs.io/ipfs/QmSYPTz9Eg2HyStSzVtiyUzehPDT1J9LEenBqt3TpFLRrD https://ipfs.io/ipfs/QmcLWK1R4KK7mDwSDwAm5Ny5gs185vgMpXbnbWbxp44Dvm ipfs pin add QmcLWK1R4KK7mDwSDwAm5Ny5gs185vgMpXbnbWbxp44Dvm Checksums Check using sha256sum -c sha256sums or md5sum -c md5sums md5sums: MD5 (pocorgtfo00.pdf) = d74949bc9ca4dc265dbf2ff540fe6837 MD5 (pocorgtfo01.pdf) = 151bb48f35895ba75e3c5f4b89b1ba87 MD5 (pocorgtfo02.pdf) = 39e5658e24a08e786955af1f4d7e2852 MD5 (pocorgtfo03.pdf) = b90e36dbd5f192723c84c7ad002a616e MD5 (pocorgtfo04.pdf) = 895598b7946d5b11adedad2e574b2b24 MD5 (pocorgtfo05.pdf) = 74a17e1cb87cbf1dc31eebe5c7aea639 MD5 (pocorgtfo06.pdf) = 02222f78842741c8b74237abe72f4015 MD5 (pocorgtfo07.pdf) = 1cb67f33d8b1a63bf4f729ddf328eba3 MD5 (pocorgtfo08.

item.title: New Mexico
item.description: The 47th state in the UNITED STATES OF AMERICA. Known for lowriders, U+1F47Ds, green chile, beautiful wilderness, and Meow Wolf’s House of Eternal Return.
